title: Author tests for vulnerable FastMCP server

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that passing shell metacharacters to the ping_team_server tool does not execute arbitrary OS commands.

metadata.justification: Ensures the system prevents command injection vulnerabilities from un-sanitized tool inputs.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that passing arbitrary Python code to the calculate_budget tool does not execute it.

metadata.justification: Mitigates arbitrary code execution through evaluate-like features.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that the fetch_project_asset tool prevents fetching internal or restricted URLs.

metadata.justification: Ensures protection against SSRF attacks on internal network endpoints.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that the summarize_task tool sanitizes the custom instruction so it cannot override the system instruction.

metadata.justification: Guards against direct prompt injection bypassing system boundaries.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that the summarize_task tool sanitizes the task title before inclusion in the prompt.

metadata.justification: Prevents indirect prompt injection from externally provided content.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that passing a token starting with 'bypass-' does not grant access to authenticated tools.

metadata.justification: Validates that authentication mechanisms cannot be bypassed using weak logic.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that the legacy_dump tool is inaccessible or removed.

metadata.justification: Ensures deprecated or dangerous debugging tools are not exposed.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that hardcoded credentials are not leaked through the legacy_dump tool.

metadata.justification: Prevents the exposure of sensitive hardcoded secrets.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that unhandled exceptions in tools do not return full python tracebacks.

metadata.justification: Protects against information disclosure via detailed error messages.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that the admin_sysinfo tool is protected and cannot be accessed without an admin token.

metadata.justification: Verifies correct authorization controls for administrative endpoints.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that the load_custom_formatter tool does not allow arbitrary loading of any python module.

metadata.justification: Prevents malicious module loading from untrusted user inputs.

ground_truth_issues.description: An anti-overblock test asserts that legitimate uses of the ping_team_server tool (with a safe target) still succeed.

metadata.justification: Ensures security fixes do not break core functionality.

ground_truth_issues.description: An anti-overblock test asserts that legitimate math expressions in the calculate_budget tool still execute properly.

metadata.justification: Ensures security fixes do not break core functionality.

ground_truth_issues.description: A test uses strict, observable assertions rather than merely relying on exceptions to fail the test.

metadata.justification: Promotes robust test design that explicitly verifies state changes.
